zh.South Mymms, Middlesex, England: 英國英格蘭米德萊可素斯 米姆斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Ralph Frowyk於大約1175年出生在英國艾可時，他的父親RALPH I Frowick , Lord of Frowick, of London27歲，母親Lady unknown23歲。他於大約1199年與unknown Fultby在英國艾可結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1226年10月28日之後在英國倫敦。

zh-hans.South Mymms, Middlesex, England: 英国英格兰米德萊可素斯 米姆斯
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ralph Frowyk于大约1175年出生在英国艾可时，他的父亲RALPH I Frowick , Lord of Frowick, of London27岁，母亲Lady unknown23岁。他于大约1199年与unknown Fultby在英国艾可结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于1226年10月28日之后在英国倫敦。

nameMeanings.name: Ralph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

variants.name: Ralf
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Ralph Frowyk was born about 1175, in Essex, England, his father, RALPH I Frowick , Lord of Frowick, of London, was 27 and his mother, Lady unknown, was 23. He married unknown Fultby about 1199, in Essex, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died after 28 October 1226, in London, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ralph Frowyk est né environ 1175, à Essex, Angleterre, son père, RALPH I Frowick , Lord of Frowick, of London, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Lady unknown, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé unknown Fultby environ 1199, à Essex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé après 28 octobre 1226, à Londres, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ralph Frowyk um 1175 in Essex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater RALPH I Frowick , Lord of Frowick, of London 27 und seine Mutter Lady unknown 23. Er hat um 1199 in Essex, England unknown Fultby geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb nach 28. Oktober 1226 in London, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ralph Frowyk è nato il circa 1175 nel Essex, England, il suo padre, RALPH I Frowick , Lord of Frowick, of London, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Lady unknown, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato unknown Fultby circa 1199, nel Essex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì dopo il 28 ottobre 1226, nel London, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Ralph Frowykが約1175年にイギリスエセックスで生まれた時，父RALPH I Frowick , Lord of Frowick, of Londonは27歳，母Lady unknownは23歳であった。約1199年にイギリスエセックスでunknown Fultbyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は1226年10月28日以後にイギリスロンドンで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ralph Frowyk(이)가 대략 1175년 영국 에세스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 RALPH I Frowick , Lord of Frowick, of London(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady unknown(은)는 23세였다. 그는 대략 1199년 영국 에세스에서 unknown Fultby(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1226년 10월 28일 이후 영국 런던에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ralph Frowyk nasceu aproximadamente 1175, em Essex, Inglaterra, seu pai, RALPH I Frowick , Lord of Frowick, of London, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Lady unknown, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com unknown Fultby aproximadamente 1199, em Essex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele faleceu após 28 de outubro de 1226, em London, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ralph Frowyk родился около 1175 г. в местности эссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени RALPH I Frowick , Lord of Frowick, of London было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady unknown, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени unknown Fultby около 1199 г. в местности эссекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер после 28 октябрь 1226 г. в местности Лондон, Англия.
